title: NotebookLM 闪卡支持编辑与添加
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
Flashcards are now editable on NotebookLM 👀
Users can adjust the text of questions and answers, plus add new cards to the stack.
FlashcardLM ⚡
NotebookLM
@NotebookLM
7h
Flashcards are now fully customizable. Edit questions, tweak answers, and add brand-new cards to create the ultimate set of study tools.
Share them with your friends, classmates, academic rivals, etc— just be prepared for the endless shower of praise and accolades that follows.
GIF
10:17 PM · Jun 22, 2026 7.4K Views
